sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ الشَّاعِرُ عَلَى الشَّاطِئِ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى الْبَحْرِ الْوَاسِعِ.
sentences.translation: Pjesnik je sjedio na obali i gledao u prostrano more.
sentences.translationEn: The poet sat on the shore and gazed at the vast sea.

sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ صَوْتَ الأَمْوَاجِ تَضْرِبُ الصُّخُورَ بِقُوَّةٍ وَرِيثَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Čuo je zvuk valova koji snažno i ritmično udaraju u stijene.
sentences.translationEn: He heard the sound of waves striking the rocks with strength and rhythm.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ دَفْتَرَهُ وَبَدَأَ يَكْتُبُ كَلِمَاتٍ عَنِ الْحُرِّيَّةِ وَالسَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Otvorio je svoju bilježnicu i počeo pisati riječi o slobodi i putovanju.
sentences.translationEn: He opened his notebook and began writing words about freedom and travel.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْبَحْرُ بِالنِّسْبَةِ لَهُ مِرْآةً تَعْكِسُ مَشَاعِرَ الْإِنْسَانِ الْعَمِيقَةَ.
sentences.translation: More je za njega bilo ogledalo koje odražava duboka čovjekova osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: The sea was, for him, a mirror reflecting the deep feelings of the human soul.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ حَتَّى غَابَتِ الشَّمْسُ وَرَاءَ الأُفُقِ.
sentences.translation: Pisao je sve dok sunce nije zašlo iza horizonta.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote until the sun disappeared behind the horizon.
